---
title: "Contact"
about:
    template: jolla
    image-shape: rounded
    image: assets/anthony-raborn.jpg
    links:
        - icon: bluesky
          text: Bluesky
          href: https://bsky.app/profile/raborndecisionsciences.com
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          href: https://github.com/raborn-decision-sciences
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/company/raborn-decision-sciences
        - icon: envelope-fill
          text: Email
          href: mailto:hello@raborndecisionsciences.com 
---

You can contact Raborn Decision Sciences via Bluesky, GitHub, LinkedIn, or email, with all links provided below.
